input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.6.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.6.1
            TITLE: the chassis must include both a main hoop and a front hoop.

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.6.1: The Chassis must include both a Main Hoop and a Front Hoop.
F.5.6.1 The Chassis must include both a Main Hoop and a Front Hoop.

final_answer: The Chassis must include both a Main Hoop and a Front Hoop.
